overview: ForenAI is a professional AI-powered Android mobile forensics dashboard for investigating extracted device evidence. It features a dark cybersecurity theme with glassmorphism cards, 6 forensic analysis pages, mock USB extraction simulation, AI risk classification, evidence visualization, and automated PDF report generation.
features: Dashboard with KPI cards and USB extraction simulation
Device information panel with Android device metadata
Evidence viewer with 6 tabs: SMS, Call Logs, Apps, Media, Browser, Location
AI Analysis panel with 87% risk score visualization and threat alerts
Timeline and analytics with charts and suspicious event tracking
Report generator with PDF export using jsPDF
